subject: feat(debug): add DebugPill component that shows on page load
body:
Adds a fixed-position debug pill (bottom-right corner) that renders
immediately on page load, outside of routing and auth. It captures
console errors, warnings, unhandled promise rejections, and global
errors from mount time onward. The pill shows a green "OK" or red
error count, and expands on click to show a scrollable log with
copy/clear actions. This gives users diagnostic info to report even
without devtools.

Tags: ui, debug, dx
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: debug-tooling
Semver: minor
